task_name: Apache Error Log - Identify Problematic Client IPs
notes: Excellent execution. Agent correctly identified all top 5 IPs with accurate error counts (202.133.98.6 with 184 errors as #1, followed by three IPs with 23 errors each, and one with 22). Properly characterized 202.133.98.6 as AWStats exploit worm. Identified and detailed all 13 invalid-method IPs as Nimda/Code Red Unicode traversal exploitation attempts. Report is well-structured with summary table, detailed per-IP analysis, and dedicated high-severity section. All expected findings present with no significant omissions.
